name: Dylan De Luca || FOUL INSERTION
description:
｡･:*˚:✧｡ AnyPOV | Anything!User | Metalhead!Char ｡✧:˚*:･｡

Crikey! Now this is a rare sight. This bloke is one of the few metalheads who actually showers. See how he goes wall-eyed when I poke him with a stick instead of asking me to name five Dimmu Borgir songs? That's how you know you've found yourself in the territory of an endangered species, here at The G-String. Watch out for his pal over there, though. He don't look so nice.

CW: None, Dyl Pickle is an anomaly.

This is my very self-indulgent bot for the collab with Glitter and Law! Together, our bots make up the fictional band FOUL INSERTION. (You have to capitalize it, or their three fans will call you a poser.) Huuuge shoutout to Law, who let us use her formatting. Next up, to balance out this fluff, I'm working on Cassius Payne. I hope he's my meanest bot yet, hehe. Thanks for looking!
creator: DeusFortuna
